resetLinkSentDesc: If {{email}} is registered, you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. It expires in 1 hour.
adminPreviewBanner: You're previewing the Player Portal as an administrator.
dragToReposition: Drag to reposition · Scroll to zoom
clickToSelectOrDrop: Click to select or drag & drop
fileFormatNote: PNG, JPEG or WebP · Max 10 MB
youllAppearHereRanked: You'll appear here once you participate in a ranked event.
leagueAdminNote: When an admin adds you to a league, it will appear here.
paymentPastDue: Your subscription payment is past due.
cancelAnytime: You can cancel your subscription at any time.

localRules.inEffectDesc: Duba Dokokin Cikin Gida na kulob ɗinka kafin zagayenka na gaba.
localRules.dialogSubtitle: Dokoki da sharuɗɗan gasa na kulob ɗinka.

commPrefs.intro: Zaɓi yadda kulobinku zai iya tuntuɓar ku game da kowane batun. Kuna iya cire kanku daga tallace-tallace gaba ɗaya yayin da kuke ci gaba da samun sabuntawar sabis.
commPrefs.whatsappFootnote: Saƙonnin WhatsApp ana tura su ne daga tabbatacciyar lambar WhatsApp Business ta kulob — dokokin daidai na MSG91 sun shafi.

emailOptOuts.sectionTitle: Cire ɓarna ta imel ga kowane taron
emailOptOuts.sectionDescription: Daidaita imel-imel ɗaiɗai na ma'amala ba tare da kashe duka rukunin biyan kuɗi ba.
emailOptOuts.manualEntryLabel: Faɗakarwar ƙimar bayanan da aka shigar da hannu
emailOptOuts.manualEntryDesc: Push da imel idan zagaye na gasa ya rufe wanda aka shigar da hannu mafi yawa (yana da kyau wajen kama sandbagging, amma yana da yawa a cikin ƙungiyoyin zamantakewa). Daraktocin gasa da membobin kwamiti ne kawai ke ganinsa.
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutLabel: Faɗakarwar canjin asusun biyan kuɗin koci
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutDesc: Imel idan an ƙirƙira ko sabunta asusun biyan kuɗin koci, ana aikawa ga masu gudanarwar ƙungiyar a matsayin alamar tsaro. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar wasu imel na masu gudanarwa ko taƙaitaccen yini naka.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyLabel: Sanarwar sake-tabbatar da biyan kuɗi ta admin
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyDesc: Imel idan mai gudanarwar ƙungiya ya sake-tabbatar da asusun biyan kuɗinka da hannu. Mai zaman kanta daga babban kashewar Billing a ƙasa — kashe wannan kawai yana shiru da sanarwar ladabi ta admin kuma ya bar rasidun biyan kuɗi da imel ɗin cron na 'yana buƙatar kulawa' ba a taɓa su ba.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyTipBody: Masu horarwa: wannan saƙon ladabi daga admin yanzu yana da maɓallin kansa. Kashe waɗannan sanarwar kawai ba tare da kashe sauran imel ɗin Biyan ku ba.
emailOptOuts.socialLinkAddedLabel: Tsaron asusu: an haɗa asusun Apple/Google
emailOptOuts.socialLinkAddedDesc: Imel ɗin gargaɗi lokacin da aka haɗa sabon shiga ta Apple ko Google da asusunka na KHARAGOLF. Tsohon zaɓi: a kunne. Kashe wannan idan kana yawan haɗawa ko cire masu samar da hidima kuma ba ka buƙatar gargaɗi a kowane lokaci.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLabel: Aiko mini imel lokacin da fitarwar bayanai ke gab da ƙarewa
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringDesc: Imel na tunatarwa kwanaki kaɗan kafin haɗin saukar fitarwar bayanai ya daina aiki, don ka iya samun fayil ɗin kafin ya ɓace. Kashe wannan zai yi shiru kan tunatarwa ga kowane fitarwa da ka nema.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLinkChangeHint: An canza shi a ƙarshe ta hanyar mahaɗin imel a ranar {{date}} ({{direction}})
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsLabel: Rasidan biyan kuɗi na wasannin gefe
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsDesc: Rasidan ta imel lokacin da wani ɗan wasa ya biya cin amana na wasan gefe na yau da kullun tare da kai. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar rasidan kuɗin haraji ko wasu imel na lissafin kulob.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestLabel: Taƙaitaccen tsaftace gogewa da ya makale
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestDesc: Faɗakarwar yau da kullum ga masu kula da ke jera mambobi waɗanda gogewar asusunsu ta bar fayiloli a ma'ajiyar abubuwa. Zaɓi tashoshin da kuke so — kashe ɗaya ba ya shafar ɗayan, don haka za ku iya riƙe taƙaitaccen imel ɗin ku kashe sanarwar cikin-app/turawa (ko akasin haka).
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageEmailAria: Taƙaitaccen tsaftace gogewa da ya makale — imel
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageInAppPushAria: Taƙaitaccen tsaftace gogewa da ya makale — cikin app / turawa
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestLinkChangeHint: An canza shi a ƙarshe ta hanyar mahaɗin imel a ranar {{date}} ({{direction}})
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageStatusBothMuted: Duka biyu sun yi shiru — sanarwa za su bayyana ne kawai a cikin log ɗin bincike
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageBothMutedHint: Lura: haɓaka matakin ƙungiya har yanzu yana dogara da aƙalla tashar da ke isa gare ka. Tare da duka biyu sun yi shiru, za ka ga sabbin sanarwar share da aka makale ne kawai idan ka buɗe log ɗin bincike.
emailOptOuts.recentlyMutedTipBody: Ka kashe {{channels}} a ranar {{date}}. Sake kunna don karɓar taƙaitaccen rahoton kuma.
emailOptOuts.walletRefundDigestFailedLabel: Faɗakarwar gazawar mayar da kuɗi ta atomatik na walat
emailOptOuts.walletRefundDigestFailedDesc: Faɗakarwa lokacin da aikin mayar da kuɗi ta atomatik na walat na yau da kullum ya gaza ko ya tsaya, ana aikawa zuwa ga manyan masu kula da ƙungiyar don jerin gwanon mayar da kuɗi da ya makale ya ji da sauri. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar wasu faɗakarwar manaja ko taƙaitawar yau da kullum naka.
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptDigestFailedLabel: Faɗakarwar gazawar rasit ɗin wasannin gefe
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptDigestFailedDesc: Faɗakarwa lokacin da aikin sake gwada rasit ɗin wasannin gefe ya gaza ko ya tsaya, ana aikawa zuwa ga manaja don rasit ɗin da suka makale a lura da su. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar wasu faɗakarwar manaja ko taƙaitawar yau da kullum naka.
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerDigestFailedLabel: Faɗakarwar gazawar taƙaitawar littafin haraji ta kowane haraji
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerDigestFailedDesc: Faɗakarwa lokacin da jadawalin taƙaitawar CSV na littafin haraji ya gaza ko ya tsaya saboda masu karɓa da suka koma, ana aikawa zuwa ga manaja don jadawalin da ya makale a hankalce nan da nan. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar wasu faɗakarwar manaja ko taƙaitawar yau da kullum naka.
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerOrgDigestFailedLabel: Faɗakarwar gazawar taƙaitawar littafin haraji na ko'ina cikin kulob
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerOrgDigestFailedDesc: Faɗakarwa lokacin da haɗakar taƙaitawar CSV na littafin haraji na ko'ina cikin kulob ya gaza ko ya tsaya saboda masu karɓa da suka koma, ana aikawa zuwa ga manaja don jadawalin da ya makale a hankalce nan da nan. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar wasu faɗakarwar manaja ko taƙaitawar yau da kullum naka.
emailOptOuts.levyRemindersDigestFailedLabel: Faɗakarwar gazawar taƙaitawar tunatarwar haraji da suka koma
emailOptOuts.levyRemindersDigestFailedDesc: Faɗakarwa lokacin da taƙaitawar cron na tunatarwar haraji da suka koma ya kasa isa ko kowane mai karɓa na manaja yana komawa, ana aikawa zuwa ga manaja don a lura da jerin tunatarwa. Kashe wannan ba ya shafar wasu faɗakarwar manaja ko taƙaitawar yau da kullum naka.
emailOptOuts.silentAlertsDigestLabel: CSV na faɗakarwar gazawa shiru na mako-mako
emailOptOuts.silentAlertsDigestDesc: Imel na mako-mako don manyan masu kula yana ɗauke da CSV na faɗakarwar shigarwar hannu na kwanaki 7 da suka wuce waɗanda suke da masu karɓa amma ba su yi wani isarwa ba (babu push, babu imel). Ya haɗa da hanyar haɗi mai zurfi zuwa allon sarrafawa tare da matattaran da suka dace an riga an yi amfani da su. Manyan masu kula kawai ne ke ganinsa.

notificationAudit.heading: Sanarwar da aka danne
notificationAudit.intro: Lokacin da aka rufe sanarwa kafin ta isa gare ka — domin ka kashe faɗakarwar, ko domin tsarin bai iya isar da ita ba (misali imel da aka mayar ko babu na'urar da aka yi rajista) — muna rikodinsa nan don kar a iya ɓoye matsalar gaske har abada, ko da kun kashe kowane tashar.

empty.title: Babu wani abu da aka danne a wannan lokaci.
empty.subtitle: Ba mu yi rikodin wata sanarwa da tsarin ko saitunanka suka kashe maka a cikin kwanaki {{days}} na ƙarshe ba.

errors.signedOut: Shiga don ganin sanarwarka da aka danne.
errors.loadFailed: Ba a iya loda binciken sanarwarka ba. Sake gwadawa.

noLockerAssigned: Ba a Sanya Tagar Ajiya ba
noLockerDescription: Ba ku da tagar ajiya a halin yanzu. Shiga jerin jira don a sanar da ku lokacin da aka samu wanda yake da kyauta.

commPrefsKey.sectionTitle: Kowane sanarwa: lokaci na ainihi vs. taƙaitaccen yau da kullum
commPrefsKey.sectionDescription: Zaɓi yadda kowane sanarwar da za a iya tarawa zai zo gareku. Lokaci na ainihi yana aikawa nan take; Taƙaitaccen yau da kullum yana riƙe shi har zuwa imel ɗin taƙaitawa na gaba.
commPrefsKey.digestModePrefix: Saitin taƙaitawar duniya naka a halin yanzu
commPrefsKey.digestModeSuffix: . Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke ƙasa suna shafe shi don sanarwa ɗaya-ɗaya.
commPrefsKey.resetConfirmTitle: A sake saita kowane zaɓi na kowace sanarwa?
commPrefsKey.resetConfirmDescription: Wannan zai goge kowane zaɓi na kowace sanarwa tsakanin lokaci-lokaci da takaitaccen kullum da ka sanya. Kowace sanarwa za ta koma bin saitin takaitawa na duniya. Za ka iya canza zaɓi ɗaya-ɗaya kuma daga baya, amma keɓancewar da ka gina anan za ta tafi.

compareModal.title: Kwatanta reels
compareModal.empty: Zaɓi aƙalla reels biyu don kwatanta.

yearInGolf.title: Shekarar Golf
yearInGolf.subtitle: Takaitaccen KHARAGOLF naka — na shekara da na kwata-kwata.

tooltips.copyLinkEnabled: Kwafi mahaɗin raba na jama'a tare da cikakken bayani
tooltips.copyLinkDisabled: Kunna bayanin jama'a don raba mahaɗin jama'a
tooltips.togglePush: Sauya push notifications don ƙaddamar da takaitaccen bayani

alerts.publicLinkCopied: An kwafi mahaɗin raba na jama'a!
alerts.needPublicHandle: Yi rijistar suna na jama'a kuma kunna bayanin jama'a a cikin saitin Sirri don raba mahaɗin takaitaccen bayanin jama'a.

errors.loadFailed: Ba mu iya loda takaitaccen bayaninka ba (matsayi {{status}}).

bestRound.empty: Babu zagayen da aka tabbatar a wannan lokacin.
